api_key.description: APIKey is a secret API key (opaque string).

batch_size.description: BatchSize is the number of items to send in each batch.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether the exporter is active.

endpoint.description: Endpoint is the target URL to send data to.

endpoints.description: Endpoints is a list of endpoint configurations.

headers.description: Headers are additional headers to include in requests.

optional_retry.description: OptionalRetry is an optional retry configuration.

initial_interval.description: InitialInterval is the initial retry interval.

max_retries.description: MaxRetries is the maximum number of retries.

initial_interval.description: InitialInterval is the initial retry interval.

max_retries.description: MaxRetries is the maximum number of retries.

secrets.description: Secrets is a list of secret key-value pairs.

tags.description: Tags are optional tags to attach.

timeout.description: Timeout is the maximum time to wait for a response.
